# terrible_community_general_bitbucket_pipeline_key_pair (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `repository` (String) The repository name.
- `state` (String) Indicates desired state of the key pair.
- `workspace` (String) The repository owner. **Note:** `ignore:username` used to be an alias of this option. Since community.general 6.0.0 it is an alias of `user`.

### Optional

- `private_key` (String) The private key.
- `public_key` (String) The public key.
